name: yr
description: Yr/MET Norway source semantics and live forecast access.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch and interpret Yr/MET Norway forecasts.
interface.longDescription: Yr provides source-specific guidance for using MET Norway's Locationforecast API. Local persistence, domain-specific analysis, and downstream decisions live outside the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Fetch a weather forecast for a place.
Check weather for a planned route with times and places.
Help me interpret a Yr Locationforecast payload.
